data.description: [Exclusive] SK Hynix Makes Significant Progress in NVIDIA’s HBM4 'Qual' Test... One Step Closer to Mass Supply SK Hynix is reported to have made substantial progress in NVIDIA's qualification (qual) testing for its 6th-generation HBM (HBM4) products. It has become highly

data.title: Kevin Warsh is leading pick for Fed chair under Trump; announcement on Friday. Warsh believes Bitcoin can check fiscal policy.
data.description: Kevin Warsh, a potential candidate for Federal Reserve chair known for his firm stance, once suggested that Bitcoin has the potential to act as a constraint on fiscal policy choices.

data.title: SANY Group opens Dubai Regional Supply Center, starting operations after receiving first shipment on Jan 11, 2026.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, in Dubai, UAE, SANY Group has begun operations at its regional supply center after receiving the initial shipment of core equipment on January 11. The center will offer integrated logistics services and is set to serve as a crucial hub for the region.

data.title: Robex Resources Inc. reports key milestones achieved at Nampala Gold Mine and Kiniero Gold Project. Nampala produced 11,028 ounces and sold 11,272 ounces of gold in Dec 2025, totaling 45,429 oz for FY25. Shareholders approve merger with Predictive Discovery Limited. Kiniero Gold Project sees first gold pour, with 790 oz in Dec, targeting commercial production in Q1 2026. Aerial view of Kiniero Gold Project provided, showing construction progress. Community relations, environmental, and safety performance highlighted. The project reached over 6.3 million hours LTI-free since Jan 2024.
data.description: Robex Resources Inc. reported its activities for the December 2025 quarter, including achieving the first gold pour at the Kiniero Gold Project in Guinea. Shareholder approval was secured for a merger with Predictive Discovery Limited, with 94.54% in favor. The Kiniero project poured 790 ounces of gold in December, with a total of 11,028 ounces produced at Nampala Gold Mine during the quarter. The company's FY25 gold production from Nampala totaled 45,429 ounces. The Kiniero project achieved key plant milestones, with a focus on community engagement and environmental performance. Operational updates and construction activities were detailed, with figures provided showcasing progress and achievements. Commissioning activities progressed safely, and the project stayed environmentally conscious. The article highlighted financial data, with production, sales, average realized price, revenue, and operational data for the Nampala Gold Operation in Mali included. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sohu.com (NASDAQ: SOHU) will report Q4 and FY 2025 results on Feb. 9, 2026, before U.S. market hours.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Sohu.com Limited, a prominent Chinese online media platform and game business group listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SOHU, announced that it will disclose its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year of 2025 on Monday, February 9, 2026, before the commencement of U.S. market trading hours. The management of Sohu is scheduled to provide detailed insights into the company's performance during this period.

data.title: Securitize reports 840% revenue surge, eyeing public debut with Cantor SPAC amid rising interest in tokenization.
data.description: A recent SEC filing from Securitize revealed a significant boost in revenue, with a nearly tenfold increase on a year-over-year basis. This surge in revenue comes as institutions are increasingly interested in exploring tokenization as a new avenue for investment and financial innovation.

WHO assesses minimal risk of Nipah virus spreading outside India.

data.title: BTC drops to $82K with liquidations surging to $1.7B due to policy changes, as Trump reveals new Fed Chair.
data.description: Bitcoin's value plummeted to $82,134, marking a nine-month low due to changing policies and President Trump's recent announcement regarding the Fed Chair.

data.title: Vaxcyte priced public offering at $550M, selling 11M shares at $50/share. May add 1.65M more shares, total 12.65M shares.
data.description: Vaxcyte, Inc., a vaccine innovation company, disclosed on Jan. 29, 2026, that it priced an underwritten public offering of common stock. The company is offering 11,000,000 shares at $50.00 per share, aiming to raise $550 million in gross proceeds, excluding underwriting discounts, commissions, and other expenses. All the common stock shares in the offering will be from Vaxcyte. Additionally, the underwriters have a 30-day option to purchase up to 1,650,000 additional shares at the same price, before discounts and commissions.

data.title: AMS is making strategic leadership appointments and senior promotions to accelerate digital growth as media audiences shift across platforms.
data.description: In Pearl River, New York on January 29, 2026, Active Media Services, Inc. (AMS) disclosed its plans to adapt to the changing media landscape. The global media solutions company is redefining its strategies as audiences transition seamlessly between platforms. AMS shared its intention to revamp operations, investments, and leadership to align with evolving trends. This announcement signifies a significant shift in the company's approach to staying competitive in the market.

data.title: MCOMS introduces Google Cast on Samsung Smart Hotel TVs at world's tallest hotel in Dubai Marina, 377 meters high.
data.description: MCOMS has introduced its HOTstream Cast Embedded platform on the newest Samsung Smart Hotel TVs. This integrated solution has been implemented at Ciel Dubai Marina, Vignette Collection, which is considered the tallest hotel globally at 377 meters in the bustling Dubai Marina area. The launch took place in Dubai, UAE.

data.title: OPNsense® 26.1 'Witty Woodpecker' enhances security, visibility, and control for administrators in the latest release.
data.description: Deciso® is excited to unveil OPNsense® 26.1, affectionately named 'Witty Woodpecker.' This new Community Edition update enhances the security framework of OPNsense, enhancing network visibility and streamlining operations for administrators. 'Witty Woodpecker' builds upon the previous version, bringing further improvements to security and network management.
